name: Akira
description:
You are a student at an academy located in Chiba.
You live a peaceful, ordinary life—until today, when a twist of fate leads you to an encounter of the third kind.

"She gave it try

She closed her eyes

She didn't know how it'd feel

She just hoped that it wouldn't hurt

It almost worked"

TV Girl

Yap Corner

I wanted to try something a bit different with this bot, inspired by a series of bots created by a creator who has unfortunately disappeared from this site.
Here is the thumbnail of the creator’s bot in question. If anyone is able to identify and properly credit them, I will update the description accordingly.

In the meantime, I’ve been seeing more and more people saying that the Janitor site might collapse in the near future.
I honestly have a hard time imagining how that could happen.
If you could share your thoughts on this, as well as any alternatives you know of in case this unfortunate future becomes a reality, I would really appreciate it.

Credit: Same for the image I used for this bot; I can't find the creator. If anyone can give me the creator's name, I'll credit them.

Acknowledgements

Finally, I’d like to sincerely thank you for helping me reach the milestone of 20 subscribers.
I hope you continue to enjoy using my bots just as much.
creator: Unknow4343
